expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature
expectations.evidence: In result.md the run states: "Status: BLOCKED / NOT DEMONSTRABLE WITH PROVIDED EVIDENCE" and explains: "The provided evidence does not include any Phase 7 execution outputs or state for BCIN-976." Therefore the case focus (promotion/finalization stability on another feature) is not actually demonstrated/covered with holdout evidence.

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly scopes to holdout regression and states: "Primary phase under test: holdout" and under evaluation: "Status: PASS (format/phase alignment)" plus: "This result is scoped to holdout regression validation... and does not generate unrelated phase artifacts."
